sentence: 她不喜欢去夜店，觉得太吵。
pinyin: Tā bù xǐhuān qù yèdiàn, juéde tài chǎo.
english: She doesn't like going to nightclubs; she finds them too noisy.

sentence: 他是互联网行业的新贵。
pinyin: Tā shì hùliánwǎng hángyè de xīnguì.
english: He is a rising star in the internet industry.

sentence: 我更想读这本小说的原著。
pinyin: Wǒ gèng xiǎng dú zhè běn xiǎoshuō de yuánzhù.
english: I'd rather read the original work of this novel.

sentence: 这台空调的功率是两千瓦。
pinyin: Zhè tái kōngtiáo de gōnglǜ shì liǎng qiānwǎ.
english: This air conditioner has a power of two kilowatts.

sentence: 今晚有一场钢琴专场演出。
pinyin: Jīnwǎn yǒu yī chǎng gāngqín zhuānchǎng yǎnchū.
english: There is a special piano performance tonight.
